description_long: This object consists of a set of four modern rifles displayed horizontally on a flat, dark platform. Each rifle features a distinct stock, barrel, and magazine configuration, with visible details such as adjustable buttstocks, pistol grips, and tactical rails. The rifles vary in length and design, with some equipped with scopes or optical sights, and others with iron sights or accessory rails. The barrels are long and slender, typical of precision or sniper rifles, and some have bipods attached for stability. The materials appear to be primarily matte black metal with some polymer components, giving a tactical and robust appearance. The overall presentation suggests these are high-powered, precision firearms suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A set of four modern tactical rifles with various stocks, barrels, and sighting systems, displayed on a dark platform. The rifles feature detailed components such as scopes, bipods, and magazines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of each rifle, highlighting the barrels, stocks, and attached optics.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the profiles of the rifles, with clear visibility of the stocks, grips, and magazine shapes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the buttstocks and the alignment of the rifles, with some details of the scopes and rear sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the rifles' profiles and the arrangement of their components.
